project.name: SharkBay
project.currentFocus: Project status labels have been removed; terminal activity labels remain.

recentDecisions.decision: Completed t-084-remove-project-status-labels by removing the right Tasks project status strip and the app-derived taskStatus display state while keeping task phases and retained harness protocol consumers.
Opened t-084-remove-project-status-labels to remove right-side project status labels while keeping task phases and auditing removable state/protocol.
Completed t-083-terminal-input-observation-and-empty-state by resetting terminal output observation on user input and moving the no-terminal empty state below the tab row.
Opened t-083-terminal-input-observation-and-empty-state to prevent continuous typing from triggering working and to keep the empty terminal message below the tab row.
Completed t-082-project-status-and-terminal-labels by moving project status pills to the Tasks tab and showing aggregated terminal working/idle labels in the project list.
Opened t-082-project-status-and-terminal-labels to move project status pills into Tasks and show aggregated terminal working/idle labels in the project list.
Completed t-081-terminal-working-state-lights by making service indicators blue and terminal tabs use sustained-output green plus quiet-complete yellow states.
Opened t-081-terminal-working-state-lights to separate blue service indicators from terminal sustained-output working/done lights.
Completed t-080-terminal-output-activity-light by making terminal tab indicators turn green on recent PTY output and dim after quiet time.
Opened t-080-terminal-output-activity-light to make terminal tab indicators reflect recent PTY output across all commands.

Completed t-079-workbench-file-git-polish by removing Files icons, launching editable files with vim fallback nano, placing task detail titles below back, compacting Repository facts, and adding dirty-file diff terminal launch.
Opened t-079-workbench-file-git-polish for requested Files, task detail, and Git tab workflow polish.
Completed t-078-lazy-files-tree by changing Files tab listing from eager recursive traversal to one-directory lazy loading with safe relative directoryPath requests.
Opened t-078-lazy-files-tree to replace eager recursive Files tab traversal with one-directory-at-a-time lazy loading.
Completed t-077-files-tab-refresh-icons by preserving the Files tab across project switches, clearing stale file trees immediately, and adding subtle CSS-only Files/file/folder icons.
Opened t-077-files-tab-refresh-icons to make Files tab project switching update immediately and add low-key file/folder icons.

Completed t-076-show-all-files-directories by removing name-based Files tab skips so hidden files, .env files, .git, node_modules, build output, and symlink entries are visible while symlink escapes remain non-editable and unexpanded.
Opened t-076-show-all-files-directories to remove name-based directory/file hiding from the Files tab while preserving configured-root safety.
Completed t-075-collapsible-files-tree by adding plus/minus directory expansion controls to the Files tab with only root-level entries visible by default.
Opened t-075-collapsible-files-tree to make the Files tab tree expandable/collapsible with root-level entries visible by default.
Completed t-074-files-tab-nano-open with a right detail Files tab, configured-root-safe project file tree IPC, editable file classification, and nano launch through new terminal tabs.
Opened t-074-files-tab-nano-open to add a right detail Files tab that lists selected project files and opens editable files in a new nano terminal tab.
Completed t-073-uninstall-harness-action by adding a confirmation-gated Managed-project context menu action, safe harness file removal, exact .gitignore cleanup, and focused verification.
Advanced t-073-uninstall-harness-action to coding with configured-root containment, confirmation gate, and line-preserving .gitignore cleanup constraints.
Opened t-073-uninstall-harness-action to add a confirmation-gated right-click project action that removes harness files and only matching .gitignore lines.
Completed t-072-wechat-cli-service-command by adding narrow Python virtualenv CLI web service discovery and verifying the real ../wechat-cli command.
Advanced t-072-wechat-cli-service-command to coding after a narrow contract for wechat-cli virtualenv CLI service discovery and startup.
Opened t-072-wechat-cli-service-command to make SharkBay service controls cover the ../wechat-cli virtualenv CLI web startup command.
Completed t-071-avatar-milk-background by setting base project avatar circles to #fffdfa and Night avatar circles to translucent milk-white rgba values for transparent PNG readability.
Opened t-071-avatar-milk-background to make project avatar circles use milk-white project background color and a translucent Night variant for transparent PNG readability.

Completed t-070-favicon-first-monorepo-icons by reordering monorepo web package icon candidates so favicon.ico/png win over apple-touch-icon, icon-512, and logo assets, with real ItsMyLife verification.
Opened t-070-favicon-first-monorepo-icons to prefer committed favicon files over icon-512/logo assets in monorepo web package icon discovery.

Completed t-069-monorepo-project-icons by adding common packages/web/public and apps/web/public icon paths, scanner coverage, and real ItsMyLife verification showing local icon-512.png before favicon URLs.
Opened t-069-monorepo-project-icons to let SharkBay resolve local project icons from common monorepo frontend package assets after ItsMyLife icons were found under packages/web/public.
Completed t-068-project-service-running-dot by lifting running service project state from TerminalPane and rendering a green dot before project names in the left list.
Opened t-068-project-service-running-dot to show a green project-name indicator in the left list when a project has a running service-bound terminal tab.
Completed t-067-keep-service-dot-visible by making service status dots fixed-size/non-shrinking while keeping label ellipsis behavior.
Opened t-067-keep-service-dot-visible to keep the service status dot visible when long service pill labels are truncated.
Completed t-066-truncate-service-pill-labels by constraining service pill width and truncating long labels with ellipsis while preserving full title text.
Opened t-066-truncate-service-pill-labels to truncate long terminal-header service pill labels without changing service discovery or execution.

Completed t-065-script-labeled-dev-services by discovering root dev:* scripts and direct-child scripts.dev, labeling service pills by script semantics, using per-service cwd, and verifying real AIBF/AIGF/ItsMyLife discovery.
Opened t-065-script-labeled-dev-services to discover root dev:* scripts and direct-child scripts.dev while labeling service pills by script semantics instead of directory names.

Completed t-064-dev-service-pill-mvp with root package.json dev service discovery, terminal-header service pills, service-bound terminal tabs, stop-to-close behavior, and passing typecheck, tests, build, diff, and JSON checks.
Advanced t-064-dev-service-pill-mvp to coding after scoping the first slice to root package.json scripts.dev with no URL detection, editing UI, run history, or monorepo scanning.
Opened t-064-dev-service-pill-mvp to add a scoped dev-service control: discover root package.json scripts.dev, show a terminal-header status pill, start a service terminal tab, and close it on stop.

Completed t-063-sidebar-counts-terminal-add-button by removing left sidebar section counts and moving the new-terminal plus button into the terminal tabs row with passing typecheck, build, diff, and JSON checks.
Advanced t-063-sidebar-counts-terminal-add-button to coding after a narrow contract with no blockers or major risks.
Opened t-063-sidebar-counts-terminal-add-button to remove Managed/Not setup counts from the left sidebar and move the new-terminal plus button into the terminal tabs row.

Completed t-062-llm-agnostic-harness-language by replacing tool-specific harness/template/product language with agent-neutral Ripple wording and passing search, typecheck, focused test, JSON, and diff checks.
Opened t-062-llm-agnostic-harness-language to remove tool-specific positioning from active harness templates, docs, and user-visible copy.
Completed t-061-package-new-app by generating release/mac-arm64/SharkBay.app with npm run pack and verifying the artifact, bundle metadata, and code signature.
Opened t-061-package-new-app to produce a fresh local macOS .app artifact from the current repository state.

Completed t-060-sharkbay-project-icon-source by adding semantic resources/project-icon.png, removing branded app-icon resources from generic project-avatar discovery, and adding scanner coverage for project-icon priority.
Opened t-060-sharkbay-project-icon-source after confirming project avatar discovery used transparent-padding macOS app icon PNGs; user clarified not to hardcode a SharkBay-specific path.
Completed t-059-project-avatar-scale-reset by removing the fallback/Shark project avatar scale override and returning avatars to the base 100% image sizing.
Opened t-059-project-avatar-scale-reset to remove the 108% fallback/Shark project avatar scaling and return project avatars to 100%.
Completed t-058-night-detail-chip-polish by softening Night priority badges, Info chips, project count bubbles, and reducing project avatar scaling from 118% to 108%.
Opened t-058-night-detail-chip-polish to soften Night right-column priority/info chips, restyle project count bubbles, and reduce project avatar scaling from 118%.
Completed t-057-night-pill-icon-polish with translucent Night pills, visible fallback project icons, filled bundled Shark project avatars, and readable Night terminal titles.
Extended t-057-night-pill-icon-polish to scale padded Shark project icons inside circular avatars and restore Night terminal header project-name contrast.
Completed t-057-night-pill-icon-polish by adding Night-only translucent pill styles and a fallback-only default project icon treatment.
Opened t-057-night-pill-icon-polish to make Night mode pill tags more translucent and improve fallback project icon visibility on dark backgrounds.
Completed t-056-morning-theme-icons by renaming Classic to Morning, preserving legacy classic config migration, and regenerating Morning/Day/Night macOS-sized icon PNG/ICNS assets.

Opened t-056-morning-theme-icons to rename Classic to Morning, migrate legacy classic configs to morning, and rebuild Morning/Day/Night app icons from the refreshed Downloads assets using Apple macOS icon guidance.
Completed t-055-classic-t050-palette by adding full default xterm ANSI colors to Classic so it fully resets from Day/Night back to the T050 terminal palette.
Completed t-054-repository-night-and-classic-terminal with Night Repository fact tile colors and Classic terminal parity fixes.
Completed t-053-classic-theme-and-night-panels with persisted Classic theme selection, original dark terminal styling for Classic, and night-mode Decisions/Git panel coverage.

Completed t-052-theme-icon-polish with rounded full-bleed app icons, warmer day terminal palette, original-inspired dark teal night terminal palette, and night-mode coverage for project rows and detail tabs.
Completed t-051-day-night-theme-icons with day/night app icons, persisted Settings theme selection, matching UI palettes, terminal theme integration, and packaged day icon verification.
Completed t-050-project-icons with local app icon data URLs, URL-derived favicon candidates, circular left-list rendering, and bundled shark-fin fallback.
Opened t-050-project-icons to add circular left-list project icons with local app icon, web favicon, and bundled shark-fin fallback resolution.
Completed t-049-packaged-app-blank-screen with relative Vite renderer assets and runtime templateRoot propagation for packaged project detail reads.
Opened t-049-packaged-app-blank-screen because the built macOS app launches to a blank white screen.

Completed t-047-hide-xterm-custom-scrollbar by hiding xterm's custom scrollbar/shadow DOM in the terminal panel with passing verification.
Opened t-047-hide-xterm-custom-scrollbar because xterm also renders a custom translucent scrollbar separate from native browser scrollbars.
Completed t-046-hide-terminal-scrollbars with hidden xterm scrollbars, preserved scrollback, and passing verification.
Opened t-046-hide-terminal-scrollbars to hide the middle terminal column scrollbar while preserving terminal scrollback.
Completed t-045-workbench-column-inset-balance with equal top and bottom outer spacing for terminal/detail columns and passing verification.
Opened t-045-workbench-column-inset-balance to restore equal top and bottom outer spacing for the terminal and right detail columns while preserving left traffic-light avoidance.
Completed t-044-workbench-layout-polish with left-column-only titlebar drag space, terminal bottom padding, taller right detail tabs, and passing verification.
Opened t-044-workbench-layout-polish to constrain hidden-titlebar space to the left column, prevent terminal bottom-line clipping, and increase right detail tab height.
Completed t-043-custom-app-icon with repository icon assets, Electron BrowserWindow icon wiring, macOS Dock icon setup, and passing verification.
Opened t-043-custom-app-icon to use the provided ~/Downloads/shark.png asset as the SharkBay Electron app icon.
Completed t-042-settings-two-column-redesign with a left settings section selector, right content pane, preserved root controls, status section, and passing verification.
Opened t-042-settings-two-column-redesign to convert Settings into a conventional two-column settings page.

Completed t-040-project-status-model with normalized taskStatus summaries, separate runner/status pills, Needs Action waiting fixes, and passing verification.

Committed T039 product changes as 9dd2d52 Add explicit legacy harness migration.

recentDecisions.decision: Completed T039 with explicit legacy harness migration, confirmed UI action, no silent cleanup, no .gitignore ownership, and passing verification.
Advanced T039 to coding with a contract that permits only explicit, confirmation-gated migration of recognized legacy harness files and forbids .gitignore changes.

Reviewed T038 and T039 against T037. T038 is satisfied by T037's setup behavior; T039 may proceed only as an explicit, human-gated legacy migration path that refuses mixed layouts and preserves unrelated root docs/tasks content.
Completed t-037-contained-sharkbay-harness-layout with contained .sharkbay setup, legacy compatibility, no setup-owned .gitignore writes, passing checks, and product docs updated.
Advanced t-037-contained-sharkbay-harness-layout to coding after recording a compatibility-first design, passing design review, and writing an implementation contract.

Opened t-037-contained-sharkbay-harness-layout with follow-up backlog tasks t-038-gitignore-agent-owned-setup-guidance and t-039-legacy-harness-file-cleanup to reduce setup intrusion into external projects.

Completed t-036-window-drag-region with a renderer drag strip, workspace traffic-light inset, passing checks, and Electron visual confirmation.
Opened t-036-window-drag-region to restore window drag/double-click affordance after hiding the native macOS title bar and to move left sidebar content below the traffic-light controls.
Committed t-035-native-titlebar-removal as 2cd09cd Hide native macOS title bar.

recentDecisions.decision: Completed t-035-native-titlebar-removal by using Electron's hiddenInset macOS title bar style on the main BrowserWindow while preserving native window controls.
Opened t-035-native-titlebar-removal to hide the visible native macOS Electron title bar while keeping native window controls.
Completed t-034-skip-existing-gitignore-setup by skipping only the setup-seeded .gitignore when it already exists during existing-directory setup while preserving all other collision protections.

Opened t-034-skip-existing-gitignore-setup because Ripple setup currently refuses to continue when an existing project has a .gitignore, even though .gitignore is project-owned and should be preserved.
Committed t-033-remove-flat-side-panel-shells as 3dd44b0 Remove side panel shells.

Completed t-033-remove-flat-side-panel-shells by removing the generic panel shell from the left and right workbench columns while preserving resizing, scrolling, terminal framing, and sticky right detail tabs.

recentDecisions.decision: Completed t-032-workbench-panel-visual-polish with transparent outer workbench panels, sticky right detail tabs, centered priority labels, and P0 display support.
Opened t-032-workbench-panel-visual-polish to flatten left/right rounded panel backgrounds, keep right detail tabs fixed during detail scrolling, and improve task priority label alignment.
Completed t-031-backlog-task-metadata-detail: artifact-less queue tasks now show queue metadata in task detail, and missing task artifact files no longer create harness error noise.
Opened t-031-backlog-task-metadata-detail because AIGF backlog task t-008 has queue metadata but no task artifact directory, and SharkBay currently hides that metadata behind a no-detail empty state.

recentDecisions.decision: Completed t-028-harness-template-sync with scan-visible template drift status and safe version-owned file update functions.
Implemented harness template sync as an explicit safe service plus scan-visible drift summary, without silent background mutation.

Opened t-028-harness-template-sync to keep installed Ripple harness files in managed projects current with SharkBay's tracked templates/harness source.

Pushed README refresh commit 0941329 to origin/main.

Open t-025-readme-publish to refresh README.md and push the current main branch to origin.

Initialized SharkBay from the project seed in init.md.
Orient SharkBay as a macOS local app rather than a browser-only web app.
Keep repository edits scoped to the current project workspace; SharkBay will later manage only directories configured inside the app.
Initialized git in the repository on branch main.
Recorded intended GitHub repository URL git@github.com:SharkUI/sharkbay.git.
Configured git remote origin as git@github.com:SharkUI/sharkbay.git.
Accepted Electron + React + TypeScript + Vite as the default MVP stack for the macOS local app.

History timestamps should be shown as readable relative times on each item, and backlog tasks must remain visible in the project detail queue.
